violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024

Observed a dead mouse in the basement. Dead or trapped birds, insects, rodents, and other pests shall be removed from the premises at a frequency that presents their accumulation, decomposition or the attraction of pests. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024

The presence of insects is not controlled as evidenced by an abundance of small flying insects in kitchen. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the grill and prep unit have an accumulation of food residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024
The floor in the kitchen is in poor repair. Inspector observed multiple holes and missing tiles (exposed wood). New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2024

The wall and foundation in the basement is in poor repair, observed holes with exposed installation. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Inspector observed openings. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024

The floors throughout the establishment have an accumulation of soil residue and rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024
